summary: Full E2E testing of ICELAB MVP. All backend endpoints (health, root, inquiries CRUD, validation) pass. Frontend renders all 7 sections + footer, navbar with 6 links, products bento grid with 6 cards, testimonials carousel (prev/next/3 dots), contact form (empty-submit blocked, invalid email blocked, valid submission shows success), mobile menu opens/closes. Resend integration confirmed working (email_sent=true persisted in MongoDB).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Inconsistency in inquiry id assignment — payload spread does not include id explicitly but Inquiry default_factory handles it (OK). Consider stripping/sanitizing HTML in message before embedding in email HTML to prevent HTML injection in Resend email body (currently raw user message inserted into HTML).
Contact form data-testid naming uses 'contact-input-name' style; while consistent locally, consider documenting convention. Existing tests rely on these exact ids.
Backend POST /api/inquiries returns 200 (FastAPI default) — typically 201 Created is preferred for resource creation, but acceptable.
No rate limiting on /api/inquiries endpoint; could be abused for spam/email cost. Recommend rate-limit middleware (e.g., slowapi) for production.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 valid TEST_Reviewer inquiry into MongoDB inquiries collection during pytest run; safe to ignore or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form testids are 'contact-input-name', 'contact-input-email', 'contact-input-company', 'contact-select-type', 'contact-input-message', 'contact-submit-button', 'contact-success-message', 'contact-error-message'. Navbar nav-link ids: about/products/process/values/stories/contact (note: testimonials section id is 'testimonials' but nav link is 'nav-link-stories'). Testimonials testids: testimonial-prev, testimonial-next, testimonial-dot-{n}. Mobile menu: mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu. Resend test API successfully delivers (email_sent=true). Backend endpoint returns 200 not 201.
